html:
Exclusive to:

Palm Leaves are a resource in Shipwrecked DLC. They can be obtained by chopping down Palm Trees.

They can be used for several crafting recipes, including Thatch Packs, Thatch Sails, Sea Traps, Tropical Parasols, Palm Leaf Huts, Wildbore Houses, Sand Castles, Blubber Suits and Tar Suits.

Palm Leaves are also a rather inefficient source of Fuel.

–Wheeler
Palm Leaves are a resource in Shipwrecked DLC. They can be obtained by chopping down Palm Trees.
They can be used for several crafting recipes, including Thatch Packs, Thatch Sails, Sea Traps, Tropical Parasols, Palm Leaf Huts, Wildbore Houses, Sand Castles, Blubber Suits and Tar Suits.
Palm Leaves are also a rather inefficient source of Fuel.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Lá Cọ là một tài nguyên trong Shipwrecked DLC. Chúng có thể thu được bằng cách chặt Cây Cọ.

Projectile being the best one. |choose=wilson}} '''Palm Leaves''' are a resource in [[Don't Starve: Shipwrecked|''Shipwrecked'']] DLC. They can be obtained by chopping down [[Palm Tree]]s. They can be used for several crafting recipes, including [[Backpack#Thatch Pack|Thatch Packs]], [[Thatch Sail]]s, [[Sea Trap]]s, [[Tropical Parasol]]s, [[Palm Leaf Hut]]s, [[Wildbore House]]s, [[Sand Castle]]s, [[Blubber Suit]]s and [[Tar Suit]]s. Palm Leaves are also a rather inefficient source of [[Fuel]]. ==Usage== {{Recipe |item1 = Palm Leaf |count1 = 4 |result = Thatch Pack}} {{Recipe |item1 = Palm Leaf |count1 = 3 |item2 = Twigs |count2 = 4 |item3 = Petals |count3 = 6 |result = Tropical Parasol}} {{Recipe |item1 = Palm Leaf |count1 = 4 |item2 = Empty_Bottle |count2 = 2 |item3 = Jellyfish |tool = Science Machine |result = Sea Trap}} {{Recipe |item1 = Palm Leaf |count1 = 4 |item2 = Vine |count2 = 2 |item3 = Bamboo |count3 = 2 |tool = Science Machine |result = Thatch Sail}} {{Recipe |item1 = Palm Leaf |count1 = 4 |item2 = Bamboo |count2 = 4 |item3 = Rope |count3 = 3 |tool = Alchemy Engine |result = Palm Leaf Hut}} {{Recipe |item1 = Palm Leaf |count1 = 5 |item2 = Bamboo |count2 = 8 |item3 = Pig Skin |count3 = 4 |tool = Alchemy Engine |result = Wildbore House}} {{Recipe |item1 = Palm Leaf |count1 = 2 |item2 = Seashell |count2 = 3 |item3 = Sand |count3 = 4 |result = Sand Castle}} {{Recipe |item1 = Palm Leaf |count1 = 2 |item2 = Blubber |count2 = 4 |item3 = Cloth |count3 = 2 |tool = Alchemy Engine |result = Blubber Suit}} {{Recipe |item1 = Palm Leaf |count1 = 2 |item2 = Tar |count2 = 4 |item3 = Cloth |count3 = 2 |tool = Science Machine |result = Tar Suit}} {{Resources}} [[fr:Feuiller de palmier]] [[pl:Liść palmy (DSS)]] [[Category:Resources]] [[Category:Flammable Objects]] [[Category:Fuel]]
